'''Dohlban''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="BH" /> located in the [[Dohlban system/Legends|Dohlban system]], a part of the [[Dohlbani sector/Legends|Dohlbani sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Kaaga Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connected it to the [[Void Station]]<ref name="TEA" /> in the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]]<ref name="Mid Rim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-sectors-of-the-mid-rim|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Sectors of the Mid Rim}}</ref> and the [[Nar Kaaga system/Legends|Nar Kaaga system]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].<ref name="TEA" />

Dohlban was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Guineo]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Due to their low intelligence, Guineo on Dohlban were mostly employed as manual laborers or hired as thugs to off-world criminal organizations.<ref name="BH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dohlban was first mentioned in [[Prima Games]]' [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|official strategy guide]] for the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]]
''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', which was written by [[David Hodgson]].<ref name="BH" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dohlban [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Dohlban, in grid square R-13.<ref name="TEA" />
